# Ruettgers Digital
> Growth systems for founder-led companies between $1M and $10M

## About
Marcel Ruettgers is a Strategic Growth Advisor based in Amsterdam, Netherlands. He builds growth systems for founder-led companies, diagnosing bottlenecks in go-to-market, building the fix with the team, and handing it over so it runs without him. His approach is called the Growth Architecture Method: Diagnose, Fix the Foundation, Build, Hand Over.

## Services
- Growth Diagnostic (The X-Ray): 2-week full audit of go-to-market systems, pipeline, lead flow, CRM, and marketing-to-sales alignment. Delivers a written report with specific findings and a prioritized action plan.
- Strategy Buildout: 4-8 week systems design and implementation. Workflows, playbooks, and automation designed for the team's actual capacity. Built alongside the team for real adoption.
- Advisory Retainer: Ongoing strategic access after buildout. Available for the decisions that matter, gone for everything else.
- AI Revenue Systems: AI-powered speed-to-lead, outbound automation, and CRM workflows wired into the actual revenue process. Built with the team, handed over to run.
- Affiliate & Partner Channel Architecture: Built from ICP, structured around unit economics. Trained and transferred in 6-8 weeks. No ongoing agency fees.
- AI Training for Marketing Teams: Hands-on workshops where teams learn to build and operate AI-powered workflows in their actual tools.

## Credentials
- Scaled Blaze.ai from 300 to 2,700 customers/month (800% growth in 9 months)
- 20 years experience spanning enterprise operations (IKEA) and high-growth startups
- Based in Amsterdam, Netherlands, serving EU and US companies remotely

## Ideal Client
Founder-led companies between $1M and $10M ARR. Post-traction, pre-scale. SaaS, coaching/consulting, clean energy, education, social impact. Growth feels harder than it should despite having traction. Systems are duct-taped together. Founder is the bottleneck.
